description:
2018 Jaguar F-Type R Dynamic P380, 3.0 SC V6, RWD, 380bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 129,000 or AED 2,021 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 35,590 KM's - 12 Months Blackline Warranty - Full Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Fuji White - Electric Memory Seats - Rear Camera - Satellite Navigation - Keyless Start - Keyless Entry - Adjustable Spoiler - Sports Exhaust - Dual Zone Climate Control - Dynamic Select - LED Headlights - Cruise Control - Climate Control - Bluetooth - 20” Alloy Wheels - Red Brake Calipers in Gloss Red
